releaseNotes: 修复本机 7 天 VIP 试用权益、服务冷启动竞态与断线恢复；皮肤页新增“更新全部”并修正状态归因；正式适配 WorkBuddy 5.3.3 的品牌、导航、发送/停止控件、项目 Hero 与输入区头像。
releaseNotesEn: Fixes local seven-day VIP trial access, service cold-start races, and reconnect recovery; adds Update All with accurate skin status attribution; and delivers verified WorkBuddy 5.3.3 brand, navigation, send/stop controls, project Hero, and composer avatar support.
